name: Dried Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------DRY BAKING MIX RECIPE---------------------------
2 cups All-Purpose Flour
1 tbsp Sugar
1 tbsp Baking Powder
1 tsp Salt
1/3 cup Lard; or shortening
To prepare Dry Baking Mix: Stir or mix dry ingredients. Cut in lard until mixture resembles fine meal.
To prepare cake:
1. Cook dried apples in 4 cups water until tender. Drain and save juice.
2. Measure 2 cups juice, adding water if needed.
3. Mix 1/4 cup sugar with Dry Baking Mix; stir in Sour Dough Starter to moisten flour.
4. Turn out onto a floured surface, knead lightly; pat or roll to a 12 x 18 inch rectangle.
5. Sprinkle with apples. Roll, starting at short end; cut into 12 slices.
6. In a large deep skillet, combine remaining sugar, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, butter and the 2 cups of apple liquid. Bring to a boil.
7. Gently lower apple slices into hot syrup.
8. Bake in a 375°F oven for 35-40 minutes.
